name: We're Going to Claim the One Piece!!!
effect_text: [Main] If your Leader has the [Animal Kingdom Pirates] or [Big Mom Pirates] type, look at 5 cards from the top of your deck; reveal up to 1 [Animal Kingdom Pirates] or [Big Mom Pirates] type card and add it to your hand. Then, place the rest at the bottom of your deck in any order. [Trigger] Activate this card's [Main] effect.
